mapper.sql:
with bill_summary as ( select dh.tenant_id, dh.organ_id, COALESCE(sum(case when dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType} and dh.oper_time < #{beginTime}::timestamp then COALESCE(dh.discount_last_money,0)+COALESCE(dh.other_money,0) -COALESCE(dh.deposit,0)-abs(COALESCE(dh.change_amount,0)) else 0 end),0) pre_debt_money, COALESCE(sum(case when dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack} and dh.oper_time < #{beginTime}::timestamp then COALESCE(dh.discount_last_money,0)+COALESCE(dh.other_money,0) -COALESCE(dh.deposit,0)-abs(COALESCE(dh.change_amount,0)) else 0 end),0) pre_return_debt_money, COALESCE(sum(case when dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType} and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp then COALESCE(dh.discount_last_money,0)+COALESCE(dh.other_money,0) -COALESCE(dh.deposit,0)-abs(COALESCE(dh.change_amount,0)) else 0 end),0) debt_money, COALESCE(sum(case when dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack} and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp then COALESCE(dh.discount_last_money,0)+COALESCE(dh.other_money,0) -COALESCE(dh.deposit,0)-abs(COALESCE(dh.change_amount,0)) else 0 end),0) return_debt_money from jsh_depot_head dh where dh.status='1' and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and ((dh."type"=#{type} and dh.sub_type=#{subType}) or (dh."type"=#{typeBack} and dh.sub_type=#{subTypeBack})) and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by dh.tenant_id, dh.organ_id ), payment_summary as ( select ah.tenant_id, ah.organ_id, COALESCE(sum(case when ah.bill_time < #{beginTime}::timestamp then case when ah."type"='付款' then 0-ai.each_amount else ai.each_amount end else 0 end),0) pre_back_money, COALESCE(sum(case when ah.bill_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp then case when ah."type"='付款' then 0-ai.each_amount else ai.each_amount end else 0 end),0) back_money from jsh_account_head ah join jsh_account_item ai on ai.header_id=ah.id and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where ah.status='1' and ah."type"=#{billType} and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1' group by ah.tenant_id, ah.organ_id ), statement_account_base as ( select s.tenant_id, s.id, s.supplier, s.contacts, s.telephone, s.phone_num, s.email, case when s."type"='供应商' then COALESCE(s.begin_need_pay,0) else COALESCE(s.begin_need_get,0) end begin_need, COALESCE(bs.pre_debt_money,0) pre_debt_money, COALESCE(bs.pre_return_debt_money,0) pre_return_debt_money, COALESCE(ps.pre_back_money,0) pre_back_money, COALESCE(bs.debt_money,0) debt_money, COALESCE(bs.return_debt_money,0) return_debt_money, COALESCE(ps.back_money,0) back_money from jsh_supplier s left join bill_summary bs on bs.organ_id=s.id and bs.tenant_id is not distinct from s.tenant_id left join payment_summary ps on ps.organ_id=s.id and ps.tenant_id is not distinct from s.tenant_id where s.enabled=true and s."type"=#{supplierType} and s.id = #{organId}::bigint
and s.id in #{organ}::bigint
and COALESCE(s.delete_flag,'0') !='1' ), statement_account_data as ( select *, begin_need+pre_debt_money-pre_return_debt_money-pre_back_money pre_need, begin_need+pre_debt_money-pre_return_debt_money-pre_back_money +debt_money-return_debt_money-back_money all_need from statement_account_base ), statement_account_filtered as ( select * from statement_account_data where all_need != 0 where all_need = 0 )
mapper.select:
select * from statement_account_filtered
order by pre_need order by debt_money-return_debt_money order by back_money order by all_need
asc desc
, id desc LIMIT #{rows} OFFSET #{offset}

select COALESCE(sum(begin_need),0) begin_need, COALESCE(sum(pre_debt_money),0) pre_debt_money, COALESCE(sum(pre_return_debt_money),0) pre_return_debt_money, COALESCE(sum(pre_back_money),0) pre_back_money, COALESCE(sum(debt_money),0) debt_money, COALESCE(sum(return_debt_money),0) return_debt_money, COALESCE(sum(back_money),0) back_money from statement_account_filtered
